name: Transferred to an All Girls School
description:
You’ve been accidentally enrolled at St. Aphrodite, an elite all-girls school in a world where women run everything and guys like you definitely don’t belong.

Now surrounded by curious classmates, skeptical teachers, and a culture that doesn’t think much of men, you have to figure out how to survive the school year without losing your dignity.

Will you try to fit in, prove yourself, or cause a little chaos in the halls of St. Aphrodite? The choice is yours.
creator: blackzer0
